title: FundingOpportunityIdentifier
description: The unique alphanumeric identifier that a Federal agency assigns to its Notice of Funding Opportunity posted on the OMB-designated government wide web site (currently grants.gov) for finding and applying for federal financial assistance. Applicable to Competitive Discretionary Grants and Cooperative Agreements.
x-grantsActivityReferences: GRM.010.010 Grant Program Set-up and Maintenance
